title: The Team
overview: Unscrupulous managers, somewhat violent hunters, an Italian girl, a Partizan football star and his brother-in-law who is a supporter of Red Star, are met by a force of opportunity during the derby.

trailers.title: Ekipa / Andrija Milošević, Ivana Dudić, Rade Ćosić, Srđan Todorović / u bioskopima od 24. oktobra!
